description: Workflow definition for processing PowerPoint (.pptx) files through the report platform pipeline

steps.name: SCAN
steps.description: Virus and malware scan of the uploaded PPTX file

compensate.description: No compensation needed for scan step

steps.name: PARSE
steps.description: Extract structured content from PPTX: slides, text blocks, tables, charts, images

compensate.description: No compensation needed; parsed data is transient

steps.name: MAP
steps.description: Map parsed PPTX content to the organization's report template schema

compensate.description: No compensation needed; mapping is stateless

steps.name: STORE_TABLE
steps.description: Persist mapped tabular data to the relational data store

compensate.description: Delete stored tabular records for this file

steps.name: STORE_DOC
steps.description: Persist mapped document data to the document store

compensate.description: Delete stored document records for this file
